case_title: OWYEUNG, LINDA Y. VS NG, STEWART #1055 et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY OWYEUNG, LINDA Y. AS TO DEFENDANT NG, STEWART #1055 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO STEWART NG.
PLAINTIFF'S LINDA OWYEUNG'S TRIAL BRIEF FILED.
PLAINTIFF LINDA OWYEUNG'S TRIAL BRIEF FILED.
DEFTS.JOINT INFORMAL BRIEF FILED BY DEFT.(CITY ATTY'S OFC).
FOLDER AT 506,TO TRAY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWYEUNG, LINDA Y. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NG, STEWART #1055 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED;TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 16 WORKING DAYS;MAILED COPIES TO OTHER PAR TIES;TO FOLDER/DIANNE.
TOLD PLTFF TO WRITE 2ND DEFT;WAS TOLD ACCESS WANT ONE DEFT. WRITTEN;MAILED COPIES TO BOTH DEFTS.
DEFT'S OPPOSITION TO PLTFF'S "REQUEST TO RECONSIDE RATION" FILED;TO FOLDER.
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ON MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION ARE IN EXHIBIT DRAWER-PLTF MUST SIGN FOR THEM.
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. COPY OF ORDER MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
"FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT." PLAINTIFF FILED SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER. SUBMITTED TO COURT, SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SC-108 ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT RECEIVED.
SC-108A: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT MAILED TO JUDGE OLLIE-MARIE VICTOIRE FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE.

SC-108A: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT/CANCEL JUDGMENT RECEIVED & FILED. ORDER BY JUDGE OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE STATES: "PLTF FAILED TO IDENTIFY ANY ERRORS TO BE CORRECTED BY THIS MOTION. SHE IS NOT ENTITLED TO APPEAL".
COPIES OF SC-108A: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT/CANCEL JUDGMENT WAS MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION "DUE TO INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT", 3RD MOTION WAS FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWYEUNG, LINDA Y. HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPY OF SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT.
ORDER ON SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT. "PLAINTIFF SHALL NOT BE ALLOWED TO FILE FURTHER MOTIONS IN THIS CASE", AS ORDERED BY JUDGE OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE.
COPY OF ORDER (SC-108A) MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

THE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF DEC-19-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR - PURSUANT TO NOVEMBER 30, 2007 ORDER. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK; FANNY RAY; NOT REPORTED (506). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
